name_en: 👄FENDI New Sunshine Dark Grey Leather Mini Handbag, embossed with snake print and FENDI ROMA lettering, featuring a hard tortoiseshell-effect organic glass handle. Equipped with a lined interior compartment, accented with matching leather trim and gold hardware. Features two handles and an adjustable detachable thin shoulder strap, allowing for both hand and shoulder carry. Model: FD8051, Dimensions: 13*6.5*18cm
